proposers.specialty_prompt: Test POLY and PDELTA programs first. Use exact finite differences and phase-specific delta checks across the full prefix.
Test AFFINE and MODAFFINE programs first. Check repeating phases, multipliers, biases, modulus behavior, and every transition.
Test LIN2 and LAGPOLY programs first. Reconstruct lagged updates and phase-specific increments from the complete prefix.
Test INTERLEAVE programs first. Split positions into two or three streams and require every stream to fit exactly.
Test GROWBLOCK programs first, then act as a skeptical alternative-rule finder across all eight allowed families.

critics.specialty_prompt: Test arithmetic, recurrence, and complete prefix reproduction. Identify the earliest concrete failure.
Search for overfit, arbitrary exceptions, shared mistakes, and simpler competing rules.

verifiers.specialty_prompt: Recompute the full prefix and all five requested terms. Exact arithmetic is the priority.
Compare surviving explanations for simplicity, prefix fit, and five-step extrapolation stability.

explorers.specialty_prompt: Specialize in POLY. Use exact finite differences or an integer-valued position polynomial and verify every term.
Specialize in PDELTA. Recover periodic phase-specific polynomial deltas and verify every update.
Specialize in AFFINE. Recover repeating phase multipliers and biases and replay every transition.
Specialize in LIN2. Recover the second-order recurrence and any repeating phase bias, then replay it exactly.
Specialize in LAGPOLY. Split lagged subsequences and recover their phase-specific polynomial increments.
Specialize in INTERLEAVE. Split positions into two or three polynomial or affine streams and verify each stream.
Specialize in GROWBLOCK. Recover block lengths, starts, and within-block steps and check every visible boundary.
Specialize in MODAFFINE. Recover the prime modulus and repeating affine phases and replay every residue exactly.

breakers.specialty_prompt: Test exact arithmetic and complete prefix reproduction.
Reject unnecessary complexity, overfit, and arbitrary exceptions.
Generate strong competing rules and identify genuine ambiguity.
Assume the largest answer cluster may share one mistake and find its strongest failure.

verifiers.specialty_prompt: Replay every transition and recompute all five next terms exactly.
Verify constants, indexes, phases, and five-step extrapolation stability.
Compare the strongest competing answers and locate the earliest property that separates their rules.
Reconstruct independently, then compare with the evidence. Do not default to the largest cluster.

synthesizers.specialty_prompt: Select the simplest exact generator that reproduces the complete prefix.
Select the answer most robust to breaker and verifier challenges. Prioritize reliable extrapolation over frequency.
